name: HRC_COMP_INST_VALS_B
description: Defines comparison instance values for an object instance.

columns.Name: INSTANCE_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: IKEY
columns.Comments: Immutable key. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to hrc_comp_obj_instances.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to hrc_comp_templates_b.

columns.Name: ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to hrc_comp_items_b.

columns.Name: CAT_DEF_VAL_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the value's category value identifier. Foreign key to hrc_comp_def_vals.

columns.Name: OPT_DEF_VAL_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the value's option value identifier. Foreign key to hrc_comp_def_vals.

columns.Name: SUGV_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if a common feature value is being used Y or N.

columns.Name: VALUE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the value's type (HEADER, ITEM, INSTANCE).

columns.Name: VALUE_NAME
columns.Comments: Specifies a value name which is used to compare.

columns.Name: VALUE_DATATYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the value datatype (VARCHAR2, CLOB, BLOB,NUMBER,DATE,TIMESTAMP, SKID).

columns.Name: VALUE_VARCHAR2
columns.Comments: Specifies the text value to be used for comparison.

columns.Name: VALUE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Specifies a number for the value.

columns.Name: VALUE_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: Specifies a timestamp for the value.

columns.Name: VALUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies a date value which is used to compare.

columns.Name: VALUE_BLOB
columns.Comments: Specifies a BLOB for the value.

columns.Name: VALUE_CLOB
columns.Comments: Specifies a CLOB for the value.

columns.Name: VALUE_SKID
columns.Comments: Specifies a surrogate key identifier for the value.

columns.Name: FOOTNOTE_REFS
columns.Comments: Specifies a collection (array) of note item references  in JSON format.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
